final:
// // This module inverts the functionality of the clock gating logic, enabling the flip-flop only when the enable signal is low.
module clock_gating (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= d; // update the flip-flop output with input d
        end
        // else q retains its value
    end
endmodule
